runs.note: Fixed X-Frame-Options from SAMEORIGIN to DENY, added all missing security headers per baseline (HSTS with 1 year max-age, X-Content-Type-Options, Cache-Control for authenticated responses, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy), and fixed getTrustedClientIP to only trust X-Forwarded-For when request comes from Cloudflare IPs to prevent spoofing.
